scripts.build-cordova: cross-env TARGET=cordova cross-env NODE_ENV=production vite build && node ./build/build-cordova.js && cd cordova && cordova build
scripts.build-cordova-ios: cross-env TARGET=cordova cross-env NODE_ENV=production vite build && node ./build/build-cordova.js && cd cordova && cordova build ios --buildConfig='build.json'
scripts.cordova-ios: cross-env TARGET=cordova cross-env NODE_ENV=production vite build && node ./build/build-cordova.js && cd cordova && cordova run ios --buildConfig='build.json'
scripts.build-debug-android: cross-env TARGET=cordova cross-env NODE_ENV=production vite build && node ./build/build-cordova.js && cd cordova && cordova build android --debug --buildConfig='build.json'
scripts.build-release-android: cross-env TARGET=cordova cross-env NODE_ENV=production vite build && node ./build/build-cordova.js && cd cordova && cordova build android --release --buildConfig='build.json'
scripts.run-debug-android-device: cross-env TARGET=cordova cross-env NODE_ENV=production vite build && node ./build/build-cordova.js && cd cordova && cordova run android --debug --buildConfig='build.json' --device
